india_trends.title: Suzlon Energy shares surge 8%, extend 5-day rally as institutional investors raise stake in Q4
india_trends.summary: Suzlon Energy shares surged 7.6% on April 14, marking five consecutive days of gains and a cumulative 19% increase. Institutional investors raised their stake to 4.87%, despite previous pressure.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Nifty rebounds 8% in April after March rout, but stays below pre-war levels. What does it signal?
india_trends.summary: Nifty has rebounded 8% in April after a sharp March correction but remains below pre-war levels, signalling cautious recovery. The bounce is driven by short covering and selective buying, while persistent FII outflows, elevated crude prices and geopolitical risks continue to weigh on sentiment despi

india_trends.summary: Stock market today: Analysts cautioned on the uncertainty around foreign institutional investor (FII) outflows, and potential earnings downgrades, which could limit valuation expansion.

india_trends.title: 12 stocks held by 100+ MFs surge up to 55% in just over 3 months
india_trends.summary: As of March 2026, data shows that 259 stocks were held by more than 100 mutual fund schemes, highlighting broad-based institutional interest. ETMarkets’ analysis reveals that 50 of these stocks have delivered gains of more than 10% since the start of CY26.

india_trends.title: LIC share price gains 5% after board approves 1:1 bonus issue; up over 15% in April
india_trends.summary: LIC bonus issue: LIC shares surged 5% to ₹841.30 after a 1:1 bonus issue approval, marking three consecutive days of gains. The company proposes to issue 632.49 crore equity shares, increasing its capital to ₹12,649.99 crore.&nbsp;

india_trends.summary: Four companies—Wipro, Cyient, Windlas Biotech, and Aurobindo Pharma—are set to announce or act on share buybacks this month, with Aurobindo’s record date due soon. india_trends.title: Saurabh Mukherjea has moved half his personal portfolio out of India; here's why

india_trends.summary: India's trade deficit saw a significant reduction in March. Exports increased while imports decreased. This improvement occurred despite rising tensions in West Asia. india_trends.summary: High-ticket funds pitched as “conservative” are drawing investors from smaller towns, led by hybrid strategies and distributor push.

india_trends.title: Mideast Conflict Could Still Trigger Market Turmoil, IMF Warns
india_trends.summary: Conflict in the Middle East could yet trigger the kind of turmoil that markets have so far avoided, the International Monetary Fund warned, adding its voice to a rising chorus of concern about the financial stability impact of the war.

india_trends.title: Propshare Celestia SM REIT IPO Day 3: Issue booked 86% so far. Check GMP, issue details, key dates
india_trends.summary: The Propshare Celestia SM REIT IPO runs from April 10 to April 16, offering units priced between ₹10-10.50 lakh. Institutional investors acquired 17% of units, with an 86% subscription status reported by day 3.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Wholesale inflation rises to a 3-year high of 3.88% in March
india_trends.summary: India’s wholesale inflation rose to a 38-month high of about 3.9% in March from 2.1% in February, driven by higher prices of crude oil, power and manufactured goods amid the West Asia conflict.

india_trends.title: Banks to report steady profit rise as loans grow, treasury drags
india_trends.summary: Indian banks are expected to ​report a steady profit rise ​in the January-March quarter, four brokers said, aided by credit ​growth and liquidity buffers, while higher bond yields and forex arbitrage curbs weighed on treasury income.

india_trends.title: Sebi makes it easier for firms to cut IPO size after Iran war hits sentiment, email shows
india_trends.summary: Securities and Exchange Board of India has eased norms allowing firms to reduce IPO sizes amid weak market sentiment triggered by the Iran conflict, giving issuers flexibility to navigate volatility and investor caution.
